allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"stars={d['stargazers_count']}, forks={d['forks_count']}, open_issues={d['open_issues_count']}, last_push={d['pushed_at']}, default_branch={d['default_branch']}, license={\(d.get\('license'\) or {}\).get\('spdx_id'\)}\\"\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; pkg=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**pkg.get\('dependencies',{}\),**pkg.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; ts=[k for k in deps if k.startswith\('tree-sitter-'\) and k!='tree-sitter-cli']; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(ts\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; print\('\\n'.join\(item['name'] for item in json.load\(sys.stdin\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(item['name'] for item in d\)\) if isinstance\(d, list\) else print\(d.get\('message','no extractors dir'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(item['name'] for item in d\)\) if isinstance\(d, list\) else print\(d.get\('message','no parsers dir'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('message', f\\"items={d.get\('total_count',0\)}\\"\)\); [print\(i['path']\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\)[:20]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(item['name'] for item in d\)\)")
